_meta.description: Sourced global AI-compute metrics (Epoch AI / Stanford AI Index). Geo-agnostic frontier-technology trends that GROUND the AI-shock driver's assumptions; not country macro data. Snapshot now; live download path documented in the connector.

frontier_training_compute_growth_x.note: Training compute of notable ML models has grown ~4.2x/year (~0.6 OOM/yr) over ~2010-2024 (Epoch AI). AGORA's macro capex-growth lever (~6%/yr) is a deliberately conservative INVESTMENT proxy, not raw compute growth.

compute_doubling_months.note: Frontier training compute doubling time ~6 months (Epoch AI).
